rationale.fidelity: Retains one common epsilon within the approved interval, the supplied utility-minus-privacy-loss objective, uncertain mechanism noise, and the specified privacy-utility mechanism without adding churn or penalties.
rationale.managerial_framing: Explicitly covers actor, trigger, decision, available inputs, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and operational boundaries.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning or contribution is requested or asserted, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly labels the epsilon mechanism as modeled, rejects retention and compliance claims, and notes calibration limits without inventing facts.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and well organized, but substantially longer than needed and affected by encoding artifacts.
rationale.overall: A complete, faithful privacy-utility framing that stays within the modeled outcomes.
